zh.Ouderkerk aan de Amstel, North Holland,: 荷蘭努-拉藍德武德可可 阿 德 阿姆斯特爾
zh.Asten, North Brabant, Netherlands: 荷蘭努-布拉班特阿斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Aleida van Cuijk於1200年9月26日出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特可時，她的父親Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk37歲，母親Hadewig van Merum25歲。她於大約1240年與Gijsbrecht III van Amstel結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1240年5月15日在荷蘭努-拉藍德武德可可 阿 德 阿姆斯特爾享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aleida van Cuijk于1200年9月26日出生在荷兰努-布拉班特可时，她的父亲Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk37岁，母亲Hadewig van Merum25岁。她于大约1240年与Gijsbrecht III van Amstel结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1240年5月15日在荷兰努-拉藍德武德可可 阿 德 阿姆斯特爾享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Aleida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Form of   Adelheid  , influenced by the North German form   Aleit .

en.lifeSummary: When Aleida van Cuijk was born on 26 September 1200, in Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands, her father, Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk, was 37 and her mother, Hadewig van Merum, was 25. She married Gijsbrecht III van Amstel about 1240. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 15 May 1240, in Ouderkerk aan de Amstel, North Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 39.

fr.Ouderkerk aan de Amstel, North Holland,: Ouderkerk aan de Amstel, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aleida van Cuijk est née le 26 septembre 1200, à Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Hadewig van Merum, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Gijsbrecht III van Amstel environ 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 mai 1240, à Ouderkerk aan de Amstel, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.Ouderkerk aan de Amstel, North Holland,: Ouderkerk aan de Amstel, Nord-Holland, Niederlande
de.lifeSummary: Als Aleida van Cuijk am 26. September 1200 in Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk 37 und ihre Mutter Hadewig van Merum 25. Sie hat um 1240 Gijsbrecht III van Amstel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Mai 1240 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Ouderkerk aan de Amstel, Nord-Holland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aleida van Cuijk è nata il il 26 settembre 1200 nel Cuijk, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Hadewig van Merum, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Gijsbrecht III van Amstel circa 1240. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 maggio 1240, nel Ouderkerk aan de Amstel, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 39 anni.

ko.Ouderkerk aan de Amstel, North Holland,: 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 우더커크 아아 데 아스텔
ko.lifeSummary: Aleida van Cuijk(이)가 1200년 9월 26일 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 쿠이제이크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hadewig van Merum(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1240년 Gijsbrecht III van Amstel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 5월 15일 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 우더커크 아아 데 아스텔에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aleida van Cuijk nasceu em 26 de setembro de 1200, em Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Hadewig van Merum, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Gijsbrecht III van Amstel aproximadamente 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de maio de 1240, em Ouderkerk aan de Amstel, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aleida van Cuijk родилась 26 сентября 1200 г. в местности куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Hadewig van Merum, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gijsbrecht III van Amstel около 1240 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 15 мая 1240 г. в местности оудиркирк аан де амстел, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 39 лет.
